title: Sadhayai Meeri Song Lyrics Santhosh Narayanan
stanzas:
Nira maayangal
sila kaayangal ulle
edhu theebangal
edhu saabangal ingae

idhu hormone-gal
idum kolangal ulle
vidhi yaarukkum
vandhu sodhikkum
idhu thavaralla iyalbendru
unarndhaale muppaalinge

sadhayai meeri idhayam paarkum
manidham engum illaiyaa
mandhai keeri thiruthi paarka
idhu pizhaiyin pillaiyaa

ivargal paalai padaikkum
podhu kadavul paniyil illaiyaa
padaitha paavi kodutha vesham
ulagil medai illaiyaa

parandhu poga ulagam vendaam
ennum bothum thollaiyaa
irundhu vazha udaigal podhum
ada adhizhum ellaiyaa

idhu hormone-gal
idum kolangal ulle
idharkenindha vali
kaayangal ingae

ivai paavangal
ena oor sollum indre
vidhi yaarukkum
vandhu sodhikkum
idhu thavaralla iyalbendru
unarndhaale muppaalinge

sadhayai meeri idhayam paarkum
manidham engum illaiyaa
mandhai keeri thiruthi paarka
idhu pizhaiyin pillaiyaa

ivargal paalai padaikkum
podhu kadavul paniyil illaiyaa
padaitha paavi kodutha vesham
ulagil medai illaiyaa

parandhu poga ulagam vendaam
engum bothum thollaiyaa
kidandhu vazha udaigal podhum
ada adhizhum ellaiyaa

kaalam niyaayak koondile
nammai thallum inipari
ivargal kaigal kattinaal
adhuve adhuve sovukkadi

manidhare
evarum manidhare
avargal paalai avargal solla
sakkarai mattum
kalappom naam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sadhayai Meeri?

The song conveys themes of motivation and energy, encouraging listeners to embrace life and its challenges.

In which movie does Sadhayai Meeri feature?

The movie for this song is currently unknown.

Who is the singer of Sadhayai Meeri?

The song is sung by Vijaynarain.

Who wrote the lyrics for Sadhayai Meeri?

The lyrics were penned by Vivek.

When was Sadhayai Meeri released?

The song was released on February 14, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Sadhayai Meeri serves as an energetic anthem that motivates listeners to embrace life's challenges with enthusiasm. It features vibrant lyrics that reflect a sense of determination and positivity. The upbeat tempo and engaging melody evoke feelings of excitement and empowerment, making it perfect for celebrations and workouts. Overall, the song captures the essence of living life to the fullest.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sadhayai Meeri is an electrifying track that showcases the vibrant energy of Vijaynarain's vocals, perfectly complemented by the engaging lyrics of Vivek. This song is a celebration of life and motivation, making it an ideal anthem for those looking to uplift their spirits. Dive into the rhythmic beats and let the music inspire you to push your limits!
stanzaMeanings: There are some fruits and vegetables here, which are good and bad.
This is about hormones and the troubles they bring; everyone experiences this, and it's not a mistake if you feel it.
No one has a heart that can escape from this; looking at the world, this is the child of mistakes.
When they create their own songs, is there no work for God? The world has no stage for the sinner who pretends.
We don't need a world that flies away; it's enough to have a place to live, and that is the limit.
This is about hormones and the troubles they bring; these pains are here.
These are the sinners that the world talks about; everyone experiences this, and it's not a mistake if you feel it.
No one has a heart that can escape from this; looking at the world, this is the child of mistakes.
When they create their own songs, is there no work for God? The world has no stage for the sinner who pretends.
We don't need a world that flies away; it's enough to have a place to live, and that is the limit.
In the time of justice, they will push us down; with their hands, they will control us, and that is the truth.
Humans are just humans; their songs are just sugar, and we will mix them together.
